---
subparagraph: true
format: 
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
        include-in-header: 
            - text: |
                \usepackage{titlesec}
                \titleformat{\section}{\bfseries\Large\scshape}{\thesection}{}{}
                \titleformat{\subsection}{\bfseries\scshape}{\thesubsection}{0em}{}
        keep-tex: true
        pdf-engine: lualatex
engine: knitr
---








# Heading 1 

asfff


# Heading level 1, number 2

asdf


## Heading 2

aw;ldfja
